claim: Voice AI agents for trading should combine multiple data sources: 1-minute, 15-minute, and 1-hour candlestick data plus recent news sentiment for holistic technical and macro analysis
actionable: When building AI trading agents, always feed technical indicators from multiple timeframes plus news sentiment to ensure decisions account for both short-term moves and macro events
source_title: I Built a Profitable AI Agent Day Trader - Here's How (n8n)

claim: Use HTTP requests to call free APIs (12data for market data, newsapi.org for news) rather than building data ingestion from scratch for agent workflows
actionable: Integrate free APIs into agent workflows: 12data (800 calls/month free for candlestick data) and newsapi.org for sentiment without adding custom data pipelines
source_title: I Built a Profitable AI Agent Day Trader - Here's How (n8n)

claim: AI news sentiment analysis (positive/neutral/negative + numerical score) should be provided as structured JSON with rationale so downstream agents understand not just sentiment but the reasoning
actionable: Prompt LLMs to output sentiment as JSON with: category (positive/neutral/negative), numerical score (-1 to +1), and concise rationale explaining the score
source_title: I Built a Profitable AI Agent Day Trader - Here's How (n8n)

claim: In n8n workflows, use Merge nodes to combine data sources, then Aggregate to convert multiple items into a single item so all data reaches the AI agent at once without parsing multiple outputs
actionable: In n8n: use Merge (set number of inputs), then Aggregate (select 'all item data into single list') to consolidate multiple data sources before feeding to AI agent
source_title: I Built a Profitable AI Agent Day Trader - Here's How (n8n)

claim: Use system prompts in AI agent nodes to enforce strict output format (no rationale, no extra commentary, exact field names) so downstream parsing doesn't fail
actionable: Add system message to agent nodes: 'output exactly the lines below with no rationale and no extra commentary'; specify exact field names (technical recommendation, entry price, stop-loss, exit price)
source_title: I Built a Profitable AI Agent Day Trader - Here's How (n8n)

claim: For trading agents, GPT-4.1 Mini is sufficient and cost-effective compared to larger models; cheaper models work fine for straightforward decision tasks
actionable: Use GPT-4.1 Mini for trading agent decisions instead of expensive larger models; validate its performance on test trades before live deployment
source_title: I Built a Profitable AI Agent Day Trader - Here's How (n8n)
